ddls:
CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "business_name" TEXT /* Name of the business providing the services */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Overall rating based on user reviews */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the provider */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the provider */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the provider */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the provider */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the provider */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the provider's profile picture */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the provider's account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the service category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_categories" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the user */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is from a verified user */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the review was marked as helpful */,
  "not_helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the review was marked as not helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., client, provider, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's account is active */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "appointment_time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  "appointment_status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., scheduled, completed, canceled) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the appointment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the appointment */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the appointment is completed */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for cancellation, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance_plans" (
  "insurance_plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the insurance plan */,
  "plan_details" TEXT /* Details of the insurance plan */,
  "coverage" TEXT /* Details of the coverage provided by the insurance plan */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the insurance plan provider */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the insurance plan provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insurance_plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_insurance_plans" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider */,
  "insurance_plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the insurance plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id", "insurance_plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the resource */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the resource */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was uploaded */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the resource */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the resource */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the resource is featured on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resource */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who viewed the resource */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_views_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_specialties" (
  "specialty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specialty */,
  "specialty_name" TEXT /* Name of the specialty */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the specialty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specialty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_specialty_mapping" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider */,
  "specialty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specialty */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id", "specialty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability slot */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of availability */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of availability */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location or office where the provider is available */,
  "is_booked" INTEGER /* Indicates if the slot is booked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_availability_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_credentials" (
  "credential_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credential */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider */,
  "credential_name" TEXT /* Name of the credential */,
  "issuing_organization" TEXT /* Organization that issued the credential */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date when the credential was issued */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the credential expires */,
  "document" TEXT /* URL to the document or certificate of the credential */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the credential is verified by the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credential_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_provider_credentials_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "is_native" INTEGER /* Indicates if the language is the provider's native language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provider_language_mapping" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the provider */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id", "language_id")
)
